description:
Implement `hx-popup` (T4 Infrastructure) — low-level positioning utility that anchors a floating panel to a reference element. This is the primitive that hx-tooltip, hx-dropdown, hx-popover all build on.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-popup/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-popup.ts`, `hx-popup.styles.ts`, `hx-popup.stories.ts`, `hx-popup.test.ts`

**Props:** `anchor` (string|Element — CSS selector or element ref), `placement` (12 placement values: top/right/bottom/left + start/end variants + auto), `active` (boolean — show popup), `distance` (number — gap from anchor), `skidding` (number — alignment offset), `arrow` (boolean), `arrow-placement` (`start`|`center`|`end`), `arrow-padding` (number), `flip` (boolean — auto-flip to avoid overflow), `flip-fallback-placements` (string[]), `shift` (boolean — shift along axis to stay in viewport), `auto-size` (boolean — resize to fit viewport)

**Slots:** `anchor` (the anchor element), default (the popup content)

**Events:** `hx-reposition`

**CSS Parts:** `arrow`, `popup`

**CSS Custom Properties:** `--arrow-size`, `--arrow-color`, `--auto-size-available-width`, `--auto-size-available-height`

**ARIA:** None — hx-popup is a positioning primitive. The wrapping component (hx-tooltip, etc.) handles all ARIA.

**Implementation:** Use `ResizeObserver` and `IntersectionObserver` for dynamic repositioning. The CSS anchor positioning API may be used if available, with a JavaScript fallback.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (positioning, flip, shift, arrow), axe-core zero violations, Storybook showing popup anchored to various triggers, bundle < 4KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-popup — T4 Low-Level Floating Anchor Utility
